Skip to contents
ggsegYan 1.0.1
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Yan 7-Network 100-Parcel Atlas

Source: R/data.R
yan7_100.Rd

Brain atlas for the Yan et al. (2023) homotopic cortical parcellation with 100 parcels aligned to 7 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains both 2D polygon geometry for ggseg::geom_brain() and 3D vertex indices for ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

Usage

yan7_100()

Value

A ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

References

Yan X, et al. (2023). "Homotopic local-global parcellation of the human cerebral cortex from resting-state functional connectivity." NeuroImage, 273:120010. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2023.120010

See also

Other ggseg_atlases: yan17_100(), yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_300(), yan17_400(), yan17_500(), yan17_600(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_1000(), yan7_200(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_500(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Other cortical_atlases: yan17_100(), yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_300(), yan17_400(), yan17_500(), yan17_600(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_1000(), yan7_200(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_500(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Examples

yan7_100()
#> 
#> ── yan7_100 ggseg atlas ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 100
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 100 × 3
#>     hemi  region                           label                              
#>     <chr> <chr>                            <chr>                              
#>   1 left  7networks_LH_Default_FPole       lh_7networks_LH_Default_FPole      
#>   2 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_1       lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_1      
#>   3 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_2       lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_2      
#>   4 left  7networks_LH_Default_PCC         lh_7networks_LH_Default_PCC        
#>   5 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_1      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_1     
#>   6 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_2      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_2     
#>   7 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_3      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_3     
#>   8 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCm        lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCm       
#>   9 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCv_1      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCv_1     
#>  10 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCv_2      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCv_2     
#>  11 left  7networks_LH_Default_RSC         lh_7networks_LH_Default_RSC        
#>  12 left  7networks_LH_Default_Temp_1      lh_7networks_LH_Default_Temp_1     
#>  13 left  7networks_LH_Default_Temp_2      lh_7networks_LH_Default_Temp_2     
#>  14 left  7networks_LH_Default_Temp_3      lh_7networks_LH_Default_Temp_3     
#>  15 left  7networks_LH_Cont_IPS            lh_7networks_LH_Cont_IPS           
#>  16 left  7networks_LH_Cont_PCC            lh_7networks_LH_Cont_PCC           
#>  17 left  7networks_LH_Cont_PFCl           lh_7networks_LH_Cont_PFCl          
#>  18 left  7networks_LH_Cont_PrCv           lh_7networks_LH_Cont_PrCv          
#>  19 left  7networks_LH_Cont_pCun           lh_7networks_LH_Cont_pCun          
#>  20 left  7networks_LH_Limbic_OFC          lh_7networks_LH_Limbic_OFC         
#>  21 left  7networks_LH_Limbic_PHC          lh_7networks_LH_Limbic_PHC         
#>  22 left  7networks_LH_Limbic_Temp         lh_7networks_LH_Limbic_Temp        
#>  23 left  7networks_LH_Limbic_TempPole     lh_7networks_LH_Limbic_TempPole    
#>  24 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_FrMed   lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_FrMed  
#>  25 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_Ins_1   lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_Ins_1  
#>  26 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_Ins_2   lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_Ins_2  
#>  27 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_PostC   lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_PostC  
#>  28 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_SPL     lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_SPL    
#>  29 left  7networks_LH_DorsAttn_IPS        lh_7networks_LH_DorsAttn_IPS       
#>  30 left  7networks_LH_DorsAttn_PostC      lh_7networks_LH_DorsAttn_PostC     
#>  31 left  7networks_LH_DorsAttn_PrC        lh_7networks_LH_DorsAttn_PrC       
#>  32 left  7networks_LH_DorsAttn_PrCd       lh_7networks_LH_DorsAttn_PrCd      
#>  33 left  7networks_LH_DorsAttn_SPL_1      lh_7networks_LH_DorsAttn_SPL_1     
#>  34 left  7networks_LH_DorsAttn_SPL_2      lh_7networks_LH_DorsAttn_SPL_2     
#>  35 left  7networks_LH_DorsAttn_TempOcc    lh_7networks_LH_DorsAttn_TempOcc   
#>  36 left  7networks_LH_SomMot_1            lh_7networks_LH_SomMot_1           
#>  37 left  7networks_LH_SomMot_2            lh_7networks_LH_SomMot_2           
#>  38 left  7networks_LH_SomMot_3            lh_7networks_LH_SomMot_3           
#>  39 left  7networks_LH_SomMot_4            lh_7networks_LH_SomMot_4           
#>  40 left  7networks_LH_SomMot_5            lh_7networks_LH_SomMot_5           
#>  41 left  7networks_LH_SomMot_6            lh_7networks_LH_SomMot_6           
#>  42 left  7networks_LH_SomMot_Ins          lh_7networks_LH_SomMot_Ins         
#>  43 left  7networks_LH_SomMot_ParOper      lh_7networks_LH_SomMot_ParOper     
#>  44 left  7networks_LH_Vis_1               lh_7networks_LH_Vis_1              
#>  45 left  7networks_LH_Vis_2               lh_7networks_LH_Vis_2              
#>  46 left  7networks_LH_Vis_3               lh_7networks_LH_Vis_3              
#>  47 left  7networks_LH_Vis_4               lh_7networks_LH_Vis_4              
#>  48 left  7networks_LH_Vis_5               lh_7networks_LH_Vis_5              
#>  49 left  7networks_LH_Vis_6               lh_7networks_LH_Vis_6              
#>  50 left  7networks_LH_Vis_7               lh_7networks_LH_Vis_7              
#>  51 right 7networks_RH_Cont_FPole          rh_7networks_RH_Cont_FPole         
#>  52 right 7networks_RH_Default_IPL_1       rh_7networks_RH_Default_IPL_1      
#>  53 right 7networks_RH_Default_IPL_2       rh_7networks_RH_Default_IPL_2      
#>  54 right 7networks_RH_Default_PCC         rh_7networks_RH_Default_PCC        
#>  55 right 7networks_RH_Default_PFCd_1      rh_7networks_RH_Default_PFCd_1     
#>  56 right 7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_PFCd    rh_7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_PFCd   
#>  57 right 7networks_RH_Cont_PFCd           rh_7networks_RH_Cont_PFCd          
#>  58 right 7networks_RH_Default_PFCm        rh_7networks_RH_Default_PFCm       
#>  59 right 7networks_RH_Default_PFCv_1      rh_7networks_RH_Default_PFCv_1     
#>  60 right 7networks_RH_Cont_PFCv           rh_7networks_RH_Cont_PFCv          
#>  61 right 7networks_RH_Default_RSC         rh_7networks_RH_Default_RSC        
#>  62 right 7networks_RH_Default_Temp_1      rh_7networks_RH_Default_Temp_1     
#>  63 right 7networks_RH_Default_Temp_2      rh_7networks_RH_Default_Temp_2     
#>  64 right 7networks_RH_SomMot_Temp         rh_7networks_RH_SomMot_Temp        
#>  65 right 7networks_RH_Cont_IPS            rh_7networks_RH_Cont_IPS           
#>  66 right 7networks_RH_Cont_PCC            rh_7networks_RH_Cont_PCC           
#>  67 right 7networks_RH_Cont_PFCl           rh_7networks_RH_Cont_PFCl          
#>  68 right 7networks_RH_Cont_PrCv           rh_7networks_RH_Cont_PrCv          
#>  69 right 7networks_RH_Cont_pCun           rh_7networks_RH_Cont_pCun          
#>  70 right 7networks_RH_Limbic_OFC          rh_7networks_RH_Limbic_OFC         
#>  71 right 7networks_RH_Vis_PHC             rh_7networks_RH_Vis_PHC            
#>  72 right 7networks_RH_Limbic_Temp         rh_7networks_RH_Limbic_Temp        
#>  73 right 7networks_RH_Limbic_TempPole     rh_7networks_RH_Limbic_TempPole    
#>  74 right 7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_FrMed   rh_7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_FrMed  
#>  75 right 7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_Ins_1   rh_7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_Ins_1  
#>  76 right 7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_Ins_2   rh_7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_Ins_2  
#>  77 right 7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_PostC   rh_7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_PostC  
#>  78 right 7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_SPL     rh_7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_SPL    
#>  79 right 7networks_RH_DorsAttn_IPS        rh_7networks_RH_DorsAttn_IPS       
#>  80 right 7networks_RH_SomMot_PostC        rh_7networks_RH_SomMot_PostC       
#>  81 right 7networks_RH_DorsAttn_PrC        rh_7networks_RH_DorsAttn_PrC       
#>  82 right 7networks_RH_DorsAttn_PrCd       rh_7networks_RH_DorsAttn_PrCd      
#>  83 right 7networks_RH_DorsAttn_SPL_1      rh_7networks_RH_DorsAttn_SPL_1     
#>  84 right 7networks_RH_DorsAttn_SPL_2      rh_7networks_RH_DorsAttn_SPL_2     
#>  85 right 7networks_RH_DorsAttn_TempOcc    rh_7networks_RH_DorsAttn_TempOcc   
#>  86 right 7networks_RH_SomMot_1            rh_7networks_RH_SomMot_1           
#>  87 right 7networks_RH_SomMot_2            rh_7networks_RH_SomMot_2           
#>  88 right 7networks_RH_SomMot_3            rh_7networks_RH_SomMot_3           
#>  89 right 7networks_RH_SomMot_4            rh_7networks_RH_SomMot_4           
#>  90 right 7networks_RH_SomMot_5            rh_7networks_RH_SomMot_5           
#>  91 right 7networks_RH_SomMot_6            rh_7networks_RH_SomMot_6           
#>  92 right 7networks_RH_SomMot_Ins          rh_7networks_RH_SomMot_Ins         
#>  93 right 7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_ParOper rh_7networks_RH_SalVentAttn_ParOper
#>  94 right 7networks_RH_Vis_1               rh_7networks_RH_Vis_1              
#>  95 right 7networks_RH_Vis_2               rh_7networks_RH_Vis_2              
#>  96 right 7networks_RH_Vis_3               rh_7networks_RH_Vis_3              
#>  97 right 7networks_RH_Vis_4               rh_7networks_RH_Vis_4              
#>  98 right 7networks_RH_Vis_5               rh_7networks_RH_Vis_5              
#>  99 right 7networks_RH_Vis_6               rh_7networks_RH_Vis_6              
#> 100 right 7networks_RH_Vis_7               rh_7networks_RH_Vis_7              
plot(yan7_100())
